Hello, I'm

Zak Klinedinst

Project Manager, Munters Data Center Technologies

I manage and deliver complex data center projects from concept to commissioning. Passionate about operational efficiency, cross-functional collaboration, and building things that work at scale. Here you'll find a few of the personal projects I've built along the way.

Projects

Worky McStreamline

A field service and commissioning management app for tracking HVAC/cooling system installations, service tickets, technician scheduling, and customer contact logging.

Background

Resume

I bring a track record of delivering large-scale data center projects on time and within scope. My background spans project planning, stakeholder management, and cross-functional coordination in technically demanding environments.
